# CMPackingType.sideBySide

**Case**

The video contains packed frames that have a left eye image on the left and right eye image on the right.

## Declaration

```swift
case sideBySide
```

## Discussion

For side-by-side packed frames, the width of a frame in video data is twice as wide as the video displayed.

## Frame Arrangement

- **CMPackingType.none**: Each frame contains only a single image, and isn’t frame-packed.
- **CMPackingType.overUnder**: The video contains packed frames that have a left eye image on the top and right eye image on the bottom.
